How it works

Track the market
Live dashboard, heatmaps and movers give you the full market picture at a glance.

Build your watchlist
Track your portfolio and get contextual intelligence for every holding.
05
Unlock Terminal
Go deeper with real-time flows, insider trades, options flow and full market intelligence.

Track unusual options volume, put/call ratios, and large block trades across the market. When options flow diverges from price, it often signals what smart money is positioning for next.

Options flow intensity by ticker. Green = call-heavy flow (bullish bias). Red = put-heavy flow (bearish bias). Size reflects total premium traded.

Large block trades and dark pool prints. These off-exchange transactions often precede significant price moves by 1–5 days.

Ask Logic · Command centre

Markets move fast.
Understanding them
shouldn't require a Bloomberg terminal.

Brieftick was built for a simple reason: institutional-grade market intelligence has always been locked behind expensive platforms, jargon, and noise. We're changing that by using AI to translate complex market signals into clear, actionable context for everyone from seasoned traders to first-time investors.

Democratise market intelligence.

The same tools that help hedge funds understand why markets are moving have historically been inaccessible to individual investors. Brieftick closes that gap. Not by simplifying the data, but by making it legible.

We pull from live earnings feeds, macro event trackers, options flow, insider disclosures, sentiment models, and AI briefings. We surface what matters, when it matters, in plain English.

12
Tools across every major market dimension
35+
Live data sources including Finnhub, Polygon, SEC EDGAR
Real‑time
Market data with no daily credit limits on core feeds
AI‑first
Claude-powered explanations on every major data signal

Principles we build by.

01

Explain the why, not just the what

A price move without context is noise. Brieftick always answers the follow-up question: why is this happening and what's driving it.

02

No recommendations. Ever.

We are an educational intelligence layer. We surface information, patterns, and analysis. We do not tell you what to buy or sell.

03

You know where the data comes from

Every feed, every score, every AI summary is traceable. We label data sources, flag estimated figures, and never invent information.

04

Your portfolio stays in your browser

Portfolio data is stored locally in your browser only. We never see your holdings, trades, or positions. No data is sold. Ever.

05

Built with users, not for them

Brieftick is in active beta. Every feature has been shaped by feedback from traders, investors and analysts using it in real markets.

06

Institutional depth, human language

Whether you're managing a portfolio or learning how markets work, Brieftick meets you where you are. No jargon required.

What Brieftick covers.

Live market intelligence across equities, ETFs, macro events, earnings, options flow, insider transactions, congressional disclosures, sector rotation, volatility, sentiment, and AI-generated briefings. Updated in real time during market hours, with full historical pattern matching and correlation analysis.

Built on data from Finnhub, Polygon.io, SEC EDGAR, Alpha Vantage, Anthropic Claude, and FRED. All routed through a secure proxy so your API keys stay private.

Ready to understand the market?

Brieftick is in private beta. Sign up free and start exploring market intelligence instantly.

Terms of Use

⚠ Placeholder document. Replace with your legal terms before public launch. Use a service like termly.io or consult a solicitor.

1. Nature of the service

BriefTick provides educational market intelligence only. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial advice, investment advice, or a recommendation to buy, sell or hold any security, fund, or other financial instrument.

2. No investment advice

BriefTick is not a registered investment adviser, broker-dealer, or fiduciary. All content, including summaries, market commentary, correlation data, and risk indicators, is for informational and educational purposes only. You should always conduct your own research and consult a qualified financial adviser before making any investment decisions.

3. Accuracy of information

Market data is sourced from third-party providers (Twelve Data, Finnhub, Alpha Vantage, FRED). BriefTick makes no warranty, express or implied, as to the accuracy, timeliness or completeness of any data or AI-generated content. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

4. AI-generated content

Certain features use large language models (Anthropic Claude) to generate market summaries. AI outputs may contain errors, outdated information, or hallucinations. All AI-generated content should be independently verified before reliance.

5. Acceptable use

You agree not to reproduce, redistribute, or commercially exploit any content from BriefTick without express written permission.

6. Changes to these terms

We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the platform following changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

Last updated: May 2026 · This is a placeholder document.

Privacy Policy

⚠ Placeholder document. Replace with a proper Privacy Policy before collecting emails. Use privacypolicygenerator.info or consult a solicitor.

What we collect

When you request beta access, we collect your name, email address, stated role, and optional message. We do not collect payment information.

When you use the dashboard, no personal data or portfolio information is sent to our servers. Watchlist and portfolio data is stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and never transmitted to BriefTick.

How we use your data

Your email is used solely to contact you about beta access and product updates. We do not sell, rent or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

API keys

If you add API keys via the Settings panel, they are stored locally in your browser and sent only to the respective provider (Anthropic, Twelve Data, Finnhub, Alpha Vantage) via our server-side proxy. Keys are never logged or stored on BriefTick servers.

Cookies

BriefTick uses only functional localStorage entries (watchlist, portfolio, API keys, onboarding state). We do not use advertising cookies or third-party tracking.

Your rights

You may request deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us. We will process requests within 30 days.

Contact

For privacy-related queries, contact us via the Request Access form.

Last updated: May 2026 · This is a placeholder document.

intelligent market intelligence. Understand why markets move, before the noise gets you. Educational context only, not financial advice.
